title: abutilon californicum
intro: Abutilon californicum, also known as California hollyhock or desert hollyhock, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Abutilon californicum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Abutilon californicum can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and overall well-being.
